reference: My grandmother is in critical condition right now. She is on dialysis due to end-stage renal failure, has experienced four heart attacks, septicemia, and a hemorrhagic stroke. Today, she is making voluntary movements while on a ventilator. How come the doctor is still administering dialysis to her? Please explain why.
text: My grandmother is in critical condition right now. She was on dialysis due to end-stage pulmonary failure, has experienced four heart attacks, septicemia, and a hemorrhagic stroke. Today, she is making a voluntary transplant in the go-to hospital. How come the doctor is still administering the dialysis to her? Who is it playing with?
